tasks.label: RN: Web preview (Metro web :8081) -> open in Simple Browser
tasks.detail: Runs the app as react-native-web. After it serves, open VS Code Simple Browser at http://localhost:8081 to preview inside the editor (both-platform shared UI).

tasks.label: RN: Android (build + install to running emulator)
tasks.detail: expo run/start --android. Builds the dev client (gradle 8.13, JDK 17) and installs to the booted Pixel_9_Pro_XL.

tasks.label: RN: Metro start (then press a=Android, w=web)
Android: cold-boot Pixel_9_Pro_XL emulator
tasks.detail: Launches the AVD window if not already running.
